notes: Core shoot-em-up loop works but enemies are plain colored rectangles with no Galaga-style sprites, formation diving is rudimentary, no tractor beam mechanic, and only 20 enemies in a 4x5 grid instead of the classic formation; overall feels like a generic space shooter rather than Galaga.
A very basic clone using colored squares instead of sprites; enemies instantly teleport back to formation after diving, and enemy-player collision is missing.

The game runs and basic movement/shooting work, but it is only a loose Galaga imitation with crude rectangles, missing hallmark mechanics, and a questionable wave-timer state change handled inside rendering.
